title: Russian Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful buckwheat pilaf, inspired by traditional Russian cuisine. This comforting side dish is perfect for any meal.
instructions: Heat butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the buckwheat and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the pilaf and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt and pepper to taste.
